body:
## Summary

CS07 adds the repo's first dev-only npm toolchain and a Playwright end-to-end suite that drives the real Sub Invaders browser game. The suite covers load/movement, the PR #23 CS02 torpedo-collision regression, wave advancement, game over, high-score persistence, and an iPhone 14 viewport smoke check. CI now has local Chromium PR coverage, advisory deployed-preview coverage after `swa-deploy`, and nightly Chromium/Firefox/WebKit staging coverage.

Closes none — close-out PR comes later per OPERATIONS three-PR shape.

## Deliverable mapping

| # | File path | Status |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `package.json` | done — private, `type: module`, devDependencies only, E2E scripts |
| 2 | `package-lock.json` | done — generated by `npm install` |
| 3 | `.gitignore` | done — ignores `node_modules/`, Playwright reports/results/cache |
| 4 | `playwright.config.mjs` | done — local server, Chromium default, CI reporters/retry/workers |
| 5 | `src/game/test-hooks.mjs` | done — gated `window.__subInvaders` plus test helpers |
| 6 | `src/game/main.mjs` | done — actual repo entrypoint; parses `?seed`, `?startWave`, `?formationSpeed`, installs hooks; no SW registration |
| 7 | `src/game/main.test.mjs` | done — actual adjacent Node test file; covers hook gating and query threading |
| 8 | `tests/e2e/_fixtures.mjs` | done — shared `gamePage` fixture/helpers |
| 9 | `tests/e2e/smoke.spec.mjs` | done — load/HUD/movement/no console errors |
| 10 | `tests/e2e/collision.spec.mjs` | done — CS02 regression coverage |
| 11 | `tests/e2e/wave.spec.mjs` | done — hook-clears formation and asserts wave 2 |
| 12 | `tests/e2e/game-over.spec.mjs` | done — drains lives, game-over state, reload high score |
| 13 | `tests/e2e/persistence.spec.mjs` | done — hook-set high score survives reload |
| 14 | `tests/e2e/mobile.spec.mjs` | done — iPhone 14 viewport smoke, project-browser safe |
| 15 | `.github/workflows/e2e.yml` | done — `e2e-local` plus advisory `e2e-deployed`; job-level `timeout-minutes` set (R4 finding) |
| 16 | `.github/workflows/e2e-nightly.yml` | done — daily staging run across Chromium/Firefox/WebKit, issue on failure; job-level `timeout-minutes` set (R4 finding) |
| 17 | `README.md` | done — local install/run/UI/report and new-spec snippet |
| 18 | `OPERATIONS.md` | done — future gameplay/new-scene Playwright spec rule |
| 19 | `CHANGELOG.md` | done — SI-CS07 entry |
| 20 | `tests/e2e/wave-skip.spec.mjs` | done — explicit `?startWave=N>1` regression coverage (added in fix-round R3) |

## Self-check results

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `npm install` | pass — up to date, 0 vulnerabilities |
| `npx playwright install chromium` | pass — Chromium/headless shell installed |
| `npm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium` | pass — 8/8 specs |
| Node test discovery | pass — 138 tests, 0 failures |
| Harness lint | pass |
| `dotnet test api/ --no-build` | pass — 1 test, 0 failures |
| CRLF/BOM check | pass |

## Review log

| Round | Reviewer | Verdict | Analyzed HEAD | Blocking | Non-blocking | Suggestions | Notes |
|------:|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| R1 | GPT-5.5 | **No-Go (DISPUTED — withdrawn in R2 as stale-diff false positive; see § Disagreement note)** | (older snapshot pre-`8a5dee4`) | 1 | 0 | 0 | False positive: claimed `?startWave=N` plumbed but never consumed; agent had already added the fix in `8a5dee4`/`daa128c` *before* R1 ran |
| R2 | GPT-5.5 | Go | `8c2d35a` | 0 | 0 | 0 | All 19 deliverables verified; explicitly withdrew R1 as stale-diff false positive |
| Copilot | copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] | COMMENTED | `dc58fdf` | 0 (4 review threads opened, all stale-diff: 2× startWave-not-applied, 1× webServer-always-on, 1× nightly-issue-spam) | — | — | All 4 threads resolved with explanations + cs07/content commits already had the fixes; resolution comments at `8c2d35a` |
| R3 | GPT-5.5 | Go | `c4b892f` | 0 | 0 | 0 | New `tests/e2e/wave-skip.spec.mjs` verified end-to-end |
| R4 | GPT-5.5 | Conditional Go | `c4b892f` | 0 | 2 | 0 | Comprehensive per-file audit: workflow YAML deep dive, package supply-chain, per-test assertion analysis, per-commit trailer table. RECOMMENDED-1: add `timeout-minutes` to all 4 e2e jobs. RECOMMENDED-2: ensure squash-merge commit includes Copilot trailer (recovers 4 fix-round commits that dropped it). NOTE: `e2e.yml` artifacts uploaded on `push:main` failures — orchestrator disagrees, see § Disagreement note |
| R5 | GPT-5.5 | Go | `ec26adf` | 0 | 0 | 0 | Delta review confirming R4 RECOMMENDED-1 is fixed correctly across all 4 jobs (15/15/20/5 min); single commit; trailer present; no other drift |

## Model audit

| Role | Model | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Implementer | claude-general-purpose (cs07-content-agent + cs07-fix-round-agent) | Sub-agent dispatched per OPERATIONS.md § Sub-agent dispatch |
| Reviewer | GPT-5.5 | 5 rounds (R1-R5); independence invariant satisfied (GPT-5.5 never used as implementer) |
| Fallback | n/a | Sonnet 4.6 fallback not needed; primary reviewer (GPT-5.5) available throughout |

## Disagreement note (per REVIEWS.md §165-167)

1. **R1 finding "startWave not applied in play.mjs" — DISPUTED, withdrawn.** Live verification at HEAD `c4b892f`: `?startWave=3` → `state.wave === 3` and `?startWave=5` → `state.wave === 5` after `gamePage.waitForReady()`. Both R1 and Copilot's first review analyzed an older diff state from before commits `8a5dee4`/`daa128c`/`c294613`/`8c2d35a` had landed. Root cause: neither reviewer output stated `ANALYZED HEAD: <sha>`, leaving staleness invisible. Filed harness#145 (Change 2: mandatory commit-SHA pinning in review evidence) to prevent recurrence.
2. **R4 NOTE "e2e.yml uploads artifacts on `push:main` failures" — DISAGREE, deliberately kept.** Post-merge regressions on main benefit from the report being preserved for debugging; main is trusted (no PR-controlled secrets in the report path). The R4 audit criterion ("not on main runs") was over-specified by orchestrator and is not a documented policy requirement.

## Process gaps surfaced this PR (filed for harness enforcement)

- **harness#140** — required status checks for review evidence (`review-log-evidence`, `copilot-review-attached`, `independence-invariant`, `review-threads-resolved`).
- **harness#141** — `harness review <pr>` CLI subcommand orchestrating rubber-duck + Copilot review and updating PR body via standardized template (incl. `--copilot` extension from #145 Change 6).
- **harness#142** — ban implementer self-review as evidence; codify in dispatch template + add `clickstop-implementer-not-reviewer` lint rule.
- **harness#145** — comprehensive enforcement-gap inventory: 6 groups, ~30 gates, 6 implementation-ready changes, 3-phase rollout. Supersedes #143 + #144. Specifically addresses every doctrine-without-enforcement issue surfaced on this PR (per-commit trailer lint, SHA pinning, R1 per-file enumeration, local-clean-then-Copilot ordering, Copilot engagement procedure, orchestrator verification pass).

## Test count delta

- Node tests: 135 → 138 (+3, in `src/game/main.test.mjs`).
- Playwright E2E: +8 Chromium specs under `tests/e2e/` (incl. `wave-skip.spec.mjs` from R3 fix round).

## CS02 regression evidence

Exit criterion #3 verified by design/reasoning against PR #23: `tests/e2e/collision.spec.mjs` runs the real browser game with the real formation and asserts both `score > 0` and the targeted invader `alive === false`. If `play.mjs::formationInvaders()` regresses to omit `formation.enemies`, PlayScene collision checks see no invaders, the score remains 0, and the target stays alive.

## Notes

- The CS07 plan names `src/main.mjs` / `src/main.test.mjs`, but this repo's actual browser entrypoint from CS02 is `src/game/main.mjs` and its adjacent test is `src/game/main.test.mjs`; the implementation uses those paths without changing `src/index.html`. Will be corrected in close-out PR.
- Runtime frontend remains zero-runtime-dependency: `package.json` has no `dependencies` block, only devDependencies.
- 4 fix-round commits authored by `henrik-me` (`8a5dee4`, `daa128c`, `c294613`, `8c2d35a`) are missing the `Co-authored-by: Copilot` trailer at commit level. Recovered at squash-merge by including the trailer in the squash commit body. Permanent fix: harness#145 Change 3 (`pr-commits-trailer-coverage` lint).
- Copilot review at current HEAD `ec26adf` could not be re-engaged via any documented mechanism (verified: `gh pr edit --add-reviewer Copilot` HTTP 422, `requested_reviewers` API HTTP 422, `@copilot review` comment silent for 10+ min). Last Copilot review at `dc58fdf` had its 4 threads resolved. Permanent fix: harness#145 Change 6 (Copilot engagement procedure + A16 gate). Phase-2 matrix in REVIEWS.md:255-257 does NOT require Copilot review for content PRs — only GPT-5.5 GO, which is recorded above (R5 @ `ec26adf`).
